evals.description: Standard topic — verifies all output sections populated
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
statistics array is present and contains entries with stat, source_name, source_url, date, tier, and methodology fields
statistics array has at least 5 entries (minimum when available)
Each statistic has a tier value of 1, 2, or 3
Each statistic has a non-null source_url
cover_image is either null or an object with url, platform, and alt_suggestion fields
inline_images is an array (may be empty if no quality sources found)
chart_opportunities is an array — each entry has data_points, suggested_chart_type, and title_suggestion
youtube_videos is an array — each entry has url, title, and quality_score fields
Any youtube video entry has quality_score >= 50
Output contains no prose — only JSON

evals.description: Images and videos disabled — only statistics and charts returned
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
statistics array is present and non-empty
cover_image is null (images disabled)
inline_images is an empty array [] (images disabled)
youtube_videos is an empty array [] (videos disabled)
chart_opportunities is present (may be empty array if no chartable data)

evals.description: Niche topic with few statistics — chart_opportunities may be empty
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
statistics array is present (may have fewer than 5 entries for niche topics)
chart_opportunities is an array — empty array is valid when data does not support charts
Agent does not fabricate statistics — source_url must be present for each stat
Output contains no prose or recommendations
